templates.subject_spintax: {We made|We created|We put together} a {free video|short video} from your {best|top} Google review — [business_name]
templates.preheader_spintax: {We turned your best review into a 30-second video|Your customers love you — we made a video to prove it|See what your customers are saying about [business_name]}
templates.body_spintax:
Hi {[first_name]|there},

I was looking up [niche] businesses in [city] and noticed [business_name] has some {really great|fantastic|excellent} reviews on Google.

One in particular from [review_author] {stood out|caught my eye|really resonated} — so we turned it into a free 30-second video you can use {to attract more customers|for your website or socials|however you like}.

{[video_url]|Watch it here: [video_url]}

We do this for [niche] businesses as a way to {show what we can do|introduce ourselves}. {There's no catch — it's yours to keep.|It's completely free, no strings attached.|It's yours, no obligation.}

If you'd like us to {create more videos like this|build you a full review video system|do this at scale for your business}, we should {have a quick chat|jump on a call|talk}.

{Cheers|Thanks|Best},
The {Audit&Fix|AuditFix} Team

templates.body_spintax:
Hi {[first_name]|there},

{Quick question|Just a quick one} — do you know how {powerful|effective} {video social proof|video testimonials} are for [niche] businesses?

We {spotted|found|noticed} a {great|fantastic|brilliant} review for [business_name] from [review_author] and {turned it into|made it into|created} a {free 30-second video|short video demo} for you.

{[video_url]|See it here: [video_url]}

This is the {kind of|type of} content that {converts well|gets real results|drives enquiries} — especially for {[niche] businesses|businesses like yours} in [city].

{We'd love to|Happy to} {show you how we can build a system around this|chat about what we can do for [business_name]|discuss how this works at scale}.

{Cheers|Thanks|Best},
The {Audit&Fix|AuditFix} Team
